name: io.github.vaaraio/vaara
title: Vaara
description: EU AI Act runtime evidence proxy for MCP servers: gating, tamper-evident audit, time anchor

runtimeArguments.name: --from
runtimeArguments.description: PyPI package providing the vaara-mcp-proxy entry point

packageArguments.name: --upstream
packageArguments.description: Upstream MCP server in NAME=CMD form. Repeatable for fan-out (e.g. --upstream github=npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github). Bare --upstream CMD lands under the default slot for single-upstream stdio.
